name: Cheesy New Orleans Shrimp Dip
recipeIngredient: 4 Jumbo shrimp, peel/devein and chop coarse
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook bacon until crisp, then drain on paper towels. Reserve the fat.
2. In a large bowl, mix chopped onion and minced garlic with reserved bacon fat.
3. Add shrimp, tomato, Monterey Jack cheese, Tabasco sauce, cayenne pepper, and black pepper to the bowl. Stir until all ingredients are well combined.
4. Place the mixture in a 1-quart crockpot. Cover and heat on high for about 60 minutes or until the cheese is melted.
5. If the dip is too thick, add milk gradually until desired consistency is reached. Serve with chips or crackers.
